message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A young child wearing dark sunglasses and a dark zip-up hoodie stands against a solid black background, holding a colorful bag in one hand and giving a thumbs-up with the other.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A young child wearing dark sunglasses and a dark zip-up hoodie stands against a completely crushed black background under harsh direct flash lighting, holding a colorful bag in one hand and giving a thumbs-up with the other, with severe underexposure obliterating detail in the dark clothing and surroundings.
